description_long: This house features two main residential buildings connected by a central courtyard with a pool, flanked by manicured trees. The facades are clad in light stone with large arched windows and dormer windows on the steep, dark mansard roofs. The street-facing side includes a sidewalk, street lamps, a red car, and a small storefront with blue awning, while the rear is more private with a driveway and a blue van. The landscaping includes flowering trees and a row of tall, slender evergreens. The overall design is symmetrical, with a clear division between public and private spaces. Architectural details such as wrought iron railings, decorative window frames, and a formal entryway enhance the elegant, urban character.
description: A pair of elegant, stone-clad houses with mansard roofs, arched windows, and a central courtyard pool, set in a landscaped urban street scene.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical facade, arched windows, storefront, red car, and flowering trees along the sidewalk.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the buildings, rooftop details, and the transition from public street to private rear area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the central pool, row of tall evergreens, and the more private, less ornate back entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the driveway, blue van, and additional rooftop and courtyard details.
attribute_entryway_design: Formal arched double doors with steps, decorative window frames, and wrought iron railings
